name: Frusemide

preparations.label: Undiluted (Syringe)
preparationSteps: Draw 200mg (10 amps undiluted) = 20 mls in 20mls syringe

preparations.label: Frusemide + Aminophylline (AMINOLASIX)
preparationSteps: 120mg Frusemide + 150mg Aminophylline diluted to 50ml NS (2.4:3 mg/ml)
Run 10ml/h for first hour then continue at 2 ml/h
preparations.notes: Aminophylline has properties to potentiate the effect of frusemide on kidney. Preparation from ICU Sungai Buloh.

administrationGuidance: Adult: maximum rate 4mg/min (exceeding this rate increases risk of ototoxicity). Children: maximum rate of 0.5mg/kg/min. Required single dedicated line (preferably CVL) because risk for crystallisation is high when mixed with other infusion.
importantCautions: Exceeding 4mg/min in adults increases risk of ototoxicity
Requires single dedicated line due to crystallization risk
Bolus Dose: 20 - 40mg (max 160mg) undiluted IV slow bolus 5-10mins
references: Lexicomp, Wolter Kluwer Clinical Drug Information
